rationale: In the citing paper, Wilcox et al. (2011) appears only in a methodological footnote as one of several example papers showing mediation or indirect-only effects without a direct effect. The authors do not engage its credit-card theory or findings in their conceptual framing, hypotheses, measures, or interpretation of results. Because its role is a passing illustrative citation within a grouped list, the function is mention-level rather than a meaningful directional building block.
